assertions.assertion: Local /api/orders endpoint uses .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
Calls AddRemoteApis() on the BFF builder
assertions.rationale: Does not show AddRemoteApis() in service registration

assertions.assertion: Uses MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint for /api/catalog pointing to https://catalog-service.internal/api
assertions.rationale: Shows MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint with correct path and URI
Uses .RequireAccessToken(TokenType.User) which is the v3 syntax, not .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User)
